top_signals.title: US Asset Manager PGIM Flips Fed View, Sees Three Hikes This Year
top_signals.summary: US asset manager PGIM has staked out the fringe view that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates three times this year to put the brakes on the economy — then reverse the hikes in 2027.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Nvidia plans to raise about $20 billion in first debt sale since start of AI boom
top_signals.summary: Nvidia is set raise capital in a debt sale for the first time since 2021, when the chipmaker was a fraction of its current size.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: LRT Group acquires F2F Transport
top_signals.summary:
LRT Group acquires F2F Transport. Chattanooga carrier operations continue as group pursues North American growth and fleet expansion.

The post LRT Group acquires F2F Transport appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
